description: Seek playback to a specific position (seconds). Handler does not validate `position` — current behavior forwards the value as-is to `midiPlayer.seek()`.

cases.name: edge — seek with no data (position undefined, forwarded as-is)
cases.notes: Current handler does not validate position. Calling seek(undefined) is the current observable behavior. Any refactor MUST preserve this (or explicitly add validation via ADR).
